title: T-024 — Under-receipt PO line force-close service
prompt:
# T-024 — Under-receipt PO line force-close

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §7.3 (FR-WH-008), V-WH-GRN-008.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`forceClosePoLine(poLineId, reasonCode, reasonText?)` Server Action moving a partially-received PO line to status='force_closed' with audit log.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/po-line-force-close.ts`. Validate reasonCode IN ('under_delivery','supplier_discontinued','quality_reject','other'). reason_text required when 'other'. Update po_lines.status='force_closed', append audit row 'po_line.force_closed'. RBAC: Manager or Admin.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/po-line-force-close.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/po-line-force-close.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a partial-received PO line, when forceClosePoLine runs with reason_code='under_delivery', then po_lines.status='force_closed' and an audit row exists.
2. Given reason_code='other' without reason_text, when forceClosePoLine runs, then it returns V-WH-GRN-008 validation error.
3. Given the caller is an Operator (no Manager role), when forceClosePoLine runs, then it returns an RBAC error.

## Test strategy
- RED: po-line-force-close.test.ts covers happy path, missing reason_text, RBAC.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test po-line-force-close`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not delete the PO line — only set status.
- Do not allow Operator role.
- Do not skip audit log entry.

pipeline_inputs.description: Force-close partial PO line with audit; Manager/Admin RBAC.
pipeline_inputs.details: Update status='force_closed'; insert audit row; reason_code+text validation per V-WH-GRN-008.
out_of_scope: UI surface (uses GRN wizard side-panel from T-056)
acceptance_criteria: Given a partial PO line, when forceClosePoLine runs with under_delivery, then status='force_closed' and audit row appended
Given reason_code='other' without reason_text, when run, then V-WH-GRN-008 error returns
Given an Operator caller, when run, then an RBAC error returns
test_strategy: RED: po-line-force-close.test.ts covers happy path, missing text, RBAC
